intended_use: The Minuteful - kidney test is an in-vitro diagnostic, home-use urine analysis test system for the semi-quantitative measurement of albumin and creatinine in urine, as well as the presentation of thei
intended_use_full: The Minuteful - kidney test is an in-vitro diagnostic, home-use urine analysis test system for the semi-quantitative measurement of albumin and creatinine in urine, as well as the presentation of their ratio, the albumin-creatinine ratio (ACR). The system consists of a smartphone application, proprietary Color-Board and an ACR Reagent Strip. The system is available for prescription-use only and is intended for people at risk of kidney disease. Results are intended to be used in conjunction with clinical evaluation as an aid in the assessment of kidney health.
target_condition: kidney disease; renal, urinary and metabolic disorders
ground_truth: URiSCAN Optima Urine Analyzer (predicate device); URiSCAN 2ACR Urine strips
other_metrics: Overall ±1 color block agreement: 100% for albumin-creatinine ratio, albumin, and creatinine; Repeatability: 100% exact match; Reproducibility: 100% exact match; Linearity: 100% exact match at all levels
